_comments.value: Validation rules: allowedSourceIp should be a CIDR (e.g. 203.0.113.0/24) not * in production. vmSize defaults to Standard_B1s for cost control. deployOpenAi=true requires an approved Azure subscription.

metadata.description: WARNING: '*' exposes ports 22 and 8080 to the entire internet. Set to your IP before production.
